description: Centralized Arabic root dictionary. Each root has a core meaning and explanation. Word families are computed at runtime by finding all glossary entries sharing the same root.

و ص ف.explanation: Words from this root often relate to describing a thing or its qualities.

ك ت ب.explanation: This root connects books, writing, writers, and offices.

ك ل م.explanation: This root is used for words, speech, and speaking.

ف ر د.explanation: A vocabulary item is a single item separated out for learning.

د ر س.explanation: This root is used for lessons, studying, and schools.

ج م ل.explanation: Words from this root relate to beauty and making something beautiful.

ك ب ر.explanation: This root often points to size, age, greatness, or importance.

ص غ ر.explanation: This root relates to being small, young, or reduced.

ح ج م.explanation: This root is used around size, volume, and limiting or controlling size in some derived uses.

ل و ن.explanation: This root is used for color and for making something colored.

ب ي ض.explanation: This color root is used for white and whiteness.

س و د.explanation: This color root is used for black and blackness.

ح م ر.explanation: This color root is used for red and redness.

ز ر ق.explanation: This color root is used for blue and blueness.

خ ض ر.explanation: This color root is used for green, greenness, and fresh green things.

ط و ل.explanation: This root relates to length, height, and something lasting for a long time.

ق ص ر.explanation: This root often relates to being short, limited, or falling short.

ص ف ح.explanation: This root can relate to a page, a flat side, or turning away/forgiving in other contexts.

س أ ل.explanation: This root is used for asking, questions, and requests.
